raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_2 is on the right side of box_1 with its right face exposed; the area to the right of box_2 is free of obstacles and the cup is located in front of box_2, not on its right side. This allows a lateral push without disturbing the cup.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is shifted ~10 cm rightwards, creating a gap between box_1 and box_2 wide enough for both arms to engage box_1 without collision."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "A clear gap now exists around the left and right faces of box_1; both arms can approach laterally without hitting box_2, the cup, or the tabletop. The box dimensions (30 cm) exceed claw capacity, so a non-claw bilateral hold is required.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is securely held between the two arms, lifted slightly off the table surface, completing the pick-up task."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_2 is on the right side of box_1 with its right face exposed; the area to the right of box_2 is free of obstacles and the cup is located in front of box_2, not on its right side. This allows a lateral push without disturbing the cup.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is shifted ~10 cm rightwards, creating a gap between box_1 and box_2 wide enough for both arms to engage box_1 without collision.

parsed_json.Precondition: A clear gap now exists around the left and right faces of box_1; both arms can approach laterally without hitting box_2, the cup, or the tabletop. The box dimensions (30 cm) exceed claw capacity, so a non-claw bilateral hold is required.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is securely held between the two arms, lifted slightly off the table surface, completing the pick-up task.
